rows.label: qev087506_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, Brena. Think you can
turn this into a conductor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'd have to test it,
buuuuut... Yeah, maybe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0004
rows.name: I'm just shocked you found something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0005
rows.name:
I can't think of a single BLADE more
passionate or stubborn than Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0006
rows.name:
I can see that. Guess I look
like a real fool now, don't I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0007
rows.name:
I think I'd just lost my sense of wonder
at being in this place, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0008
rows.name: Anyway, I was a jerk. Sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0009
rows.name: One problem down, one to go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0010
rows.name:
All right, problems solved! Let's
report back to the commander![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0011
rows.name:
Sure, there's rumors of ore from White
Woods and Cauldros with properties
that make for an ideal conductor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0012
rows.name:
But unless you've got FrontierNet up
in every corner of those hinterlands,
there's no way you're finding any.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087506_MSG0013
rows.name:
Probably an exercise in futility, but
hey, it's your life. Knock yourself out.[ST:wait ]
